pokemon:gogoat.name: Gogoat
pokemon:gogoat.summary: They inhabit mountainous regions. The leader of the herd is decided by a battle of clashing horns.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: They inhabit mountainous regions. The leader of the herd is decided by a battle of clashing horns.
It can tell how its Trainer is feeling by subtle shifts in the grip on its horns. This empathic sense lets them run as if one being.
It can tell how its Trainer is feeling by subtle shifts in the grip on its horns. This empathic sense lets them run as if one being.
They inhabit mountainous regions. The leader of the herd is decided by a battle of clashing horns.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: They inhabit mountainous regions. The leader of the herd is decided by a battle of clashing horns.

pokemon:skiddo.name: Skiddo
pokemon:skiddo.summary: If it has sunshine and water, it doesn’t need to eat, because it can generate energy from the leaves on its back.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: If it has sunshine and water, it doesn’t need to eat, because it can generate energy from the leaves on its back.
Thought to be one of the first Pokémon to live in harmony with humans, it has a placid disposition.
Thought to be one of the first Pokémon to live in harmony with humans, it has a placid disposition.
If it has sunshine and water, it doesn’t need to eat, because it can generate energy from the leaves on its back.

loreSummary: If it has sunshine and water, it doesn’t need to eat, because it can generate energy from the leaves on its back.
